ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the chatbot */,
  "original_text" TEXT /* Original text input from the user */,
  "reframed_text" TEXT /* Reframed text output by the chatbot */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the interaction (positive, neutral, negative) */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., query, complaint, feedback) */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Communication channel (e.g., web chat, phone, email) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the issue was resolved in the interaction */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if a follow-up is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered with the system */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., customer, support agent) */,
  "last_interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last interaction */,
  "total_interactions" INTEGER /* Total number of interactions the user has had with the chatbot */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the user across all interactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last trained */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, retired) */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "strategy_status" TEXT /* Status of the strategy (e.g., active, retired) */,
  "effectiveness_score" REAL /* Effectiveness score of the strategy */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_models" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id", "model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_strategies" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id", "strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction for which feedback is given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "feedback_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  "follow_up" INTEGER /* Indicates if a follow-up is required based on the feedback */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the issue was resolved based on the feedback */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to respond to the user's feedback in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating based on user feedback */,
  "total_interactions" INTEGER /* Total number of interactions processed by the model */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Average response time for interactions processed by the model in seconds */,
  "resolution_rate" REAL /* Percentage of interactions resolved by the model */,
  "follow_up_rate" REAL /* Percentage of interactions requiring follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating based on user feedback */,
  "total_interactions" INTEGER /* Total number of interactions processed using the strategy */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Average response time for interactions processed using the strategy in seconds */,
  "resolution_rate" REAL /* Percentage of interactions resolved using the strategy */,
  "follow_up_rate" REAL /* Percentage of interactions requiring follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_performance_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_channel" TEXT /* Preferred communication channel (e.g., web chat, phone, email) */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "preferred_response_time" INTEGER /* Preferred response time in minutes */,
  "notification_preference" TEXT /* Preference for receiving notifications (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
